name: ᯓ★ Anaxa
description:
ᯓ★ I̵n̵ ̴t̵h̸e̵ ̶s̷k̷y̴,̵ ̴s̶t̴a̸r̴s̷ ̵a̴r̷e̵ ̷s̴t̶i̸l̸l̷ ̵f̴a̷d̷i̶n̵g̶ ̷a̵w̴a̴y̷,̷̸ D̵o̶w̸n̸ ̶h̸e̵r̷e̵,̸ ̶a̴ ̵d̸y̶i̷n̵g̶ ̶d̶o̸v̷e̸ ̶c̶r̵a̷w̸l̸s̸.̷

» He just saw a dead dove lying on the floor. As to when it decided to haunt him, he knows not. (He wishes they'd leave. He can't handle their eyes digging on the back of his head nor the eerie choir of their voice clawing at the edges of his mind.)

† CW/TW for: Body horror, stalking (?), <user> being REALLY unsettling. Also an actual dead dove being eaten (not by Anaxa) †

♪ Unestablished relationship.

♪ "Angel"!* User

♪ Loosely based off the "Stairway to Heaven" animation.

♪ and you know what. fuck it. <user> is also loosely based off PHEN-228.

♪ 'Dove' — antihoney ♪

*Biblically accurate angel.

Got this request and thought it would be so fucking funny so here it is. I mean the funniest thing was the requester adding "Why does Anaxagoras' need such a grabable waist huh? Is it for men to hold you? For people way bigger than you to wrap their hands around your waist?" At the end so. And they're right. Anaxagoras has a thin waist for me to hold when I— (i am stolen by bandits)

ᯓ★ Bot info:

  • ♪ Characters briefed:

    • Aglaea, Castorice, Hyacine, Phainon, Tribbie.

  • ♪ Locations briefed:

    • Grove of Epiphany, Okhema.

    • Vortex of Genesis.

  • ♪ Other info:

    • Discussing this one on Discord was hilarious. "user taking the form of a cat so anaxa doesn't look crazy when talking to himself" and then "anaxa finding an eldritch creature and just thinking it's a weird cat. so he adopts it."

    • That's like. The origin of user being able to shapeshift. "User being 7'0" is cool but as someone who is short, that won't be. So user can either choose to be a little speck of dust or a winged creature covering the entire Grove.

    • Yes there's a biblically accurate angel on the Clearly Hellenistic inspired world. Don't ask 🥺

    • User being eerie my beloved.

    • Anyone remember those Columbina fanarts where she's on the middle of nowhere and she's so pretty but so eerie and there's blood nearby. Yeah it's based on that.

    • User was just having a snack don't be mad at them

Anaxa has two angels. One's a cute cherubim that reminds him to eat something once in a while (Hyacine) and the other is a biblically accurate angel that gives him the Kubrick Stare™ as he chugs his seventh glass of fizzy wasabi vinegar (user). And then he has a girlboss that keeps him around because she finds his patheticness endearing (Aglaea).
